prompt:
Declaration (in markdown format):

# Distributed Ralph

## Pool
- 6 implementer (`sonnet-4.6`), 1 reviewer (`opus-4.7`), max 2 per repo

## Backlog
- `fix_plan.md` in `github.com/lambda-run/ops`
- Claim: branch lock, 10m TTL
- Release on: merge, abandon, TTL expiry

## Protocol
- Conflict: last-write-wins after rebase
- Escalate after 3 rebase conflicts to reviewer pool
- Gossip claim/merge/block to `slack:#ralph-bus`

## Loop
- Continue while backlog has open tasks
- Stop if: budget > $50, kill switch, error rate > 30%

## Crash
- Release claims, requeue with retry++
- Max 3 retries, then park for human

## Observability
- Log claim/commit/fail to loki
- Metrics: success rate, p50 task seconds, claim contention
- Surface when error rate > 20% or queue stuck > 30m

## Termination
- Backlog empty, budget exhausted, or human signals done

Output a flat bullet list manifest of every concrete element this declaration implies.
manifest:
- Distributed Ralph
- Pool of 6 implementers
- Implementer model: `sonnet-4.6`
- Pool of 1 reviewer
- Reviewer model: `opus-4.7`
- Maximum 2 agents per repo
- Backlog source: `fix_plan.md`
- Backlog repo: `github.com/lambda-run/ops`
- Claim mechanism: branch lock
- Claim TTL: 10m
- Release claim on merge
- Release claim on abandon
- Release claim on TTL expiry
- Conflict handling: last-write-wins after rebase
- Escalate after 3 rebase conflicts
- Escalation target: reviewer pool
- Gossip claim events to `slack:#ralph-bus`
- Gossip merge events to `slack:#ralph-bus`
- Gossip block events to `slack:#ralph-bus`
- Continue loop while backlog has open tasks
- Stop loop if budget > $50
- Stop loop if kill switch is triggered
- Stop loop if error rate > 30%
- On crash, release claims
- On crash, requeue task with `retry++`
- Maximum retries: 3
- After max retries, park task for human
- Log claim events to loki
- Log commit events to loki
- Log fail events to loki
- Metric: success rate
- Metric: p50 task seconds
- Metric: claim contention
- Surface when error rate > 20%
- Surface when queue stuck > 30m
- Terminate when backlog is empty
- Terminate when budget is exhausted
- Terminate when human signals done
